title: TestReport entity (ONT-E-20, D-02)
description: A test report — outcome of a TestCase execution. Linked to TestCase via test_case_ref FOREIGN KEY (NOT a relation per RESEARCH.md Open Question #2 and ADR-002). Composes entity.base.schema.json via allOf + $ref + unevaluatedProperties: false (Pitfall #1 lock; NEVER additionalProperties: false). Per ADR-002, detailed step-by-step trace and DO-178C/DO-254 evidence-classification fields are deferred to v0.2.0+. T-02-07-03 mitigation: test_case_ref is REQUIRED so fabricated outcomes cannot dangle without a plan; Phase 3 validator confirms FK resolves. Examples: 'TR-PWR-001 PASS for TestCase TC-PWR-001 executed 2026-04-15 by ACME Test Lab'. Schema version: 0.1.0.

test_case_ref.description: FOREIGN KEY — URI of the TestCase this report executes. Per ADR-002 / RESEARCH.md Open Question #2, this is a typed field rather than a relation; Phase 3 broken-ref check confirms resolution. Example: 'aviationkb://test-case/tc-pwr-001@1'.

executed_at.description: ISO 8601 date the test was executed (YYYY-MM-DD). Use the start date for multi-day tests; record duration in results_summary if relevant.

executed_by.description: URI to the Person OR Organization that executed the test. Phase 3 validator confirms URI resolves to a Person or Organization entity.

outcome.description: Test outcome. pass = all acceptance_criteria met. fail = at least one acceptance criterion not met. partial = test partially executed (some criteria met, others not exercised). inconclusive = test executed but results do not support a pass/fail call (e.g. instrumentation failure).

results_summary.description: Human-readable summary of what happened and what was measured. ≥20 characters. Example: 'All 47 DO-160G Section 21 sub-tests passed within ±5% of nominal. Minor anomaly observed in voltage-spike-recovery transient at -55°C; root-caused to instrumentation lag and re-tested with corrected setup, no anomaly.'

artifacts_url.description: Optional link to test data, photographs, oscilloscope traces, or full report PDF. Should be a stable URL the reviewer can resolve. Example: 'https://test-archive.example.com/TR-PWR-001/'.

reviewers.description: Optional list of Person URIs who reviewed and signed off on this report. Distinct from provenance.reviewer (which is the reviewer of the YAML record itself); these are the engineers who reviewed the underlying test.
